title: compute_ancestry_q_v1 — manifest contract for groupwise ancestry-Q aggregation
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='compute_ancestry_q'. Wraps /api/ancestry/groupwise_q (atlas_server.py:2061), which reads the instant_q cache and aggregates per-group mean Q for one chromosome × scale × K. The response shape is captured under a staging_ancestry_q_v0 envelope; a normalized ancestry_q_v1 schema will be added once the per-group payload stabilises.
